It harnesses the Seed Support System (SSS) fund to catalyse promising early-stage ventures and prototype development, enabling innovators to transform ideas into market-ready products. The hub champions collaborative project development, offering technical mentoring, infrastructure, and strategic networking, thus driving interdisciplinary innovation and real-world problem-solving. A defining feature is the integration of EPICS (Engineering Projects in Community Service), guiding teams to design impactful solutions for societal challenges. Through focused support, industry partnerships, and a commitment to excellence, the CSE Innovation Hub plays a pivotal role in building a robust ecosystem for innovation, knowledge transfer, and sustained technology-led growth. ‎ Startups Established Total No. : 07 Academic Year Name of the Founder Details of the Startup Established Reference Number Status 2024-2025 Gandham Kumar NSL Prakash 228W5A0514 Vidyavaran Tech Innovations LLP SRN M29815029 Active S.
